# Awesome AI Media

> The most comprehensive open-source directory of AI video creation and social media automation tools, maintained since 2024.

## Docs

- [Tool Directory](https://github.com/JuneYaooo/awesome-ai-media/blob/main/README.md): Complete categorized list of all tools
- [Chinese Version](https://github.com/JuneYaooo/awesome-ai-media-cn/blob/main/README.md): 中文版合集

## Categories

- [One-Click Video Generation](https://github.com/JuneYaooo/awesome-ai-media#one-click-video-generation): Auto-generate short videos from a topic
- [AI Text-to-Video Models](https://github.com/JuneYaooo/awesome-ai-media#ai-text-to-video-models): Open-source video generation models
- [Social Media Automation](https://github.com/JuneYaooo/awesome-ai-media#social-media-automation): Scheduling and multi-platform publishing
- [Subtitle and Localization](https://github.com/JuneYaooo/awesome-ai-media#subtitle-and-localization): Transcription, translation, and dubbing

## Related

- [AI Media Skills](https://github.com/JuneYaooo/awesome-ai-media-skills): Claude Code skills and MCP servers for media
- [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/JuneYaooo/awesome-ai-media/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
